-- 1 of 8 --

Two Main Reasons for Coaching
Two main reasons to coach more than one person
S 	Conflict or problem
S 	Team building- Increase passion, to get along better, to have more in
common
Sometimes the two people have different reasons for being in coaching
and then the first goal for the coach is to align their reason for
coaching
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 8 --

5 Keys to Success
1 	Make sure everyone is heard through taking turns, or speaking
privately
2 	Never take a side or appear to be siding with one person
3 	When necessary be the voice of your clients with the purpose of
elevating their communication
4 	Introduce a third option if working with two choices which are
being negotiated
5 	End session with a positive memory, future plan, or emotional
purpose
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 8 --

1 Taking Turns
S 	What to do when you have a strong talker
S 	How to pull out a shy or resistant client
S 	When to split session into two shorter private sessions
S 	Compassion exercise for greater understanding and love
S 	Introducing purpose
S 	Elevating the relationship through questions
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 8 --

2 Being Neutral
S 	Coach should remember there are always different experiences, points
of view and solutions other than one clients view.
S 	Choose your battles wisely, be clear in a session about how you want to
help the two or more people in the following hour or hours. When you
have a clear purpose this will set the tone for clients to want solutions.
S 	Encourage and compliment honesty, emotions, coming to the session.
Find ways to elevate the couple through your positive observations.
S 	Remember- See the good, Stay with your purpose, and Know you can
change today’s experience of relationship, for this couple or family.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 8 --

3 Be the Voice
S 	Repeat what a client is expressing in a way that the other can hear it
more easily
S 	Take a complaint and explain it as an expression of love and concern
S 	Remind the couple of their deepest, most truthful and loving desires.
You can say, “From seeing you my guess is…” or “I imagine….”
S 	Remember most people want love, respect, loyalty, honesty, and
protection from their relationship. Some want more certainty, growth,
or variety in addition to the first 5 emotional experiences. You can take
any desire presented by a client and explain through a need they have
making it easier to understand and give.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 8 --

4 Create a third option
S 	You can be creative and think out of the box
S 	If two people are stuck with different strong opinions offer a third,
fourth or fifth choice
S 	Explain that to do what one person wants will not bring happiness
to either person in long run
S 	Explain you can help create a plan, decision or choice which makes
both people happier but first both must want to find this type of
solution.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 8 --

5 End on high emotional point
S 	Speak about purpose, emotions, and love
S 	Focus on this coming week and what will make the difference day
by day- give strategy or homework
S 	Guide couple or family members through remembering good times,
end with a good time they will create in the near future
S 	Remind all clients of their strengths what they give, do, are that is
unique and empowering. Remind them of why they other loves
them
S 	Give the neutral, I’m not in it so I see it perspective of the coach.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
